steps.title: Use the shared traits
steps.content: The sentence says hedgehog tenrecs and true hedgehogs are not closely related but share protective spines, pointed snouts, and small body size. The blank needs a phrase meaning shared features.

steps.title: Reject illogical nouns
steps.content: A would make tenrecs share examples of true hedgehogs, which is not the intended meaning. B suggests shared worries. C suggests signs or evidence of hedgehogs rather than shared physical traits. The needed phrase says the animals have comparable features. The answer is D.
